content:
A heads-up for @everyone because I was just made aware and this could affect any and all of us.
Over the last few days there have been many, many examples the past few days of people's Discord accounts getting suddenly and PERMANENTLY banned, without warning, without recourse, for **posting images that contain grids.**

Discord recently deployed an update to their automatic AI moderation system with the intention of detecting, filtering and removing CSAM (||Child Sexual Abuse Material||), but the training data they used was polluted; a way that creeps had been dodging content detection in the past was by overlaying a grid over top of the images, so now Discord AI has been trained to assume that any image that contains a grid or checkerboard pattern is CSAM and instantaneously ban the user that posts it.

Examples of images flagged from known cases:
brick walls 
pool tiles 
drawn grids 
stream layout screenshots 
top down pictures of keyboards 
**\>>> spreadsheets (google docs, excel, so on)**
grills
cut salmon
aseprite screenshots
minecraft inventory
deltarune battle ui 
wordle
notebook paper
checkerboard patterns
chess boards
pixel art

Be very careful about posting images for a few days and hope that the issue resolves itself. There have been rumors that the cases have been getting fewer and fewer today, but we're better off safe than sorry, especially with what we do here.

## TL;DR: Try not to post images that contain grid patterns for a while. This includes screenshots of Excel spreadsheets, Google spreadsheets, Google Drive & PC Folder contents, and fucking *Wordle* apparently. Discord AI may permanently ban you without warning because it thinks you may have posted CSAM.
